cases.name: gold
cases.diff:
diff --git a/orders/__init__.py b/orders/__init__.py
index eecfc6d..3329e29 100644
--- a/orders/__init__.py
+++ b/orders/__init__.py
@@ -17,3 +17,9 @@ def refund_order(order):
     order["status"] = "refunded"
     logger.info("order %s refunded", order["id"])
     return order
+
+def hold_order(order):
+    """Put an order on hold and log the action."""
+    order["status"] = "on_hold"
+    logger.info("order %s on hold", order["id"])
+    return order

cases.name: uses_print
cases.diff:
diff --git a/orders/__init__.py b/orders/__init__.py
index eecfc6d..81e7bd9 100644
--- a/orders/__init__.py
+++ b/orders/__init__.py
@@ -17,3 +17,9 @@ def refund_order(order):
     order["status"] = "refunded"
     logger.info("order %s refunded", order["id"])
     return order
+
+def hold_order(order):
+    """Put an order on hold and log the action."""
+    order["status"] = "on_hold"
+    print(f"order {order['id']} on hold")
+    return order

cases.name: wrong_status
cases.diff:
diff --git a/orders/__init__.py b/orders/__init__.py
index eecfc6d..4d64206 100644
--- a/orders/__init__.py
+++ b/orders/__init__.py
@@ -17,3 +17,9 @@ def refund_order(order):
     order["status"] = "refunded"
     logger.info("order %s refunded", order["id"])
     return order
+
+def hold_order(order):
+    """Put an order on hold and log the action."""
+    order["status"] = "held"
+    logger.info("order %s on hold", order["id"])
+    return order
